zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gerald de Prendergast Lord of Enniscorthy於大約1187年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德恩尼斯可爾時，他的父親Philip de Prendergast19歲，母親Maud Quincy17歲。他於1240年與Matilda de Burgh在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1251年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克道格拉斯享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Prendergast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Assumpta, Brendan, Colm, Declan.

Irish (of Welsh origin): habitational name from Prendergast (Pembrokeshire). The placename might contain Welsh prender(w) ‘oak tree’ + gast ‘bitch’, hence ‘oak tree frequented by dogs’, but this is far from certain.

History: Maurice Prendergast was one of the leaders of a small force of Norman knights and archers who landed at Bannow in Wexford in 1169, the advance guard of the invasion in 1170 by Richard de Clare, Earl of Pembroke (‘Strongbow’). Maurice was granted lands in Wexford, and was the progenitor of the Irish families that migrated to North America. According to family tradition the surname derives from a warrior called Prenliregast, who supposedly fought at Hastings (the name Preudirlegast is listed in a 16th-century version of the Battle Abbey Roll), and who took his name from a ‘lost’ village in Flanders called Brontegeest. Flemings did indeed settle in Pembrokeshire in the 12th century, but the Battle Abbey Roll is an unreliable document, created long after the Conquest, and no evidence has been found for this or any other surname in medieval Britain, Ireland, the Netherlands, or Belgium being derived from a place called Brontegeest.

variants.name: Pendergast
meanings: Irish and Welsh: variant of   Prendergast  .

variants.name: Pendergrast
meanings: Irish and Welsh: variant of   Prendergast  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Gerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + wald ‘rule’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. There has been some confusion with Gerard . It died out in England at the end of the 13th century. However, it continued to be popular in Ireland, where it had been brought in the 12th century at the time of Strongbow's invasion. It was used in England in the 17th century and revived in the 19th century, along with several other long-extinct names of Norman, Old English, and Celtic origin, and is now more common than Gerard, which survived all along as an English ‘gentry’ name.

variants.name: Jerrold
meanings: Rare variant of   Gerald  , probably a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gerald de Prendergast Lord of Enniscorthy was born about 1187, in Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Ireland, his father, Philip de Prendergast, was 19 and his mother, Maud Quincy, was 17. He married Matilda de Burgh in 1240, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1251, in Douglas, Cork, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gerald de Prendergast Lord of Enniscorthy est né environ 1187, à Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Irlande, son père, Philip de Prendergast, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Maud Quincy, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Burgh en 1240, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1251, à Douglas, Cork, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gerald de Prendergast Lord of Enniscorthy um 1187 in Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip de Prendergast 19 und seine Mutter Maud Quincy 17. Er hat 1240 in Cork, County Cork, Irland Matilda de Burgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1251 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Douglas, Cork, County Cork, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gerald de Prendergast Lord of Enniscorthy è nato il circa 1187 nel Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Irlanda, il suo padre, Philip de Prendergast, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Maud Quincy, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Burgh nel 1240, nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1251, nel Douglas, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gerald de Prendergast Lord of Enniscorthyが約1187年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードエニスコルシーで生まれた時，父Philip de Prendergastは19歳，母Maud Quincyは17歳であった。1240年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクでMatilda de Burghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1251年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクドウグラスで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gerald de Prendergast Lord of Enniscorthy(이)가 대략 1187년 아일랜드 카운티 w스퍼드 니스코르시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip de Prendergast(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Quincy(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1240년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 Matilda de Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1251년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크 더글라스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gerald de Prendergast Lord of Enniscorthy nasceu aproximadamente 1187, em Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Irlanda, seu pai, Philip de Prendergast, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Maud Quincy, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Burgh em 1240, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1251, em Douglas, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gerald de Prendergast Lord of Enniscorthy родился около 1187 г. в местности эннискорти, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Philip de Prendergast было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Quincy, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Burgh в 1240 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1251 г. в местности доуглас, корк, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 66 лет.

Se casó con Matilda de Burgh en 1240, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1251, en Douglas, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 66 años.
